title: Pre-Matric Scholarship — Print Renewal Application
blurb: Print or download your pre-matric renewal application.
match_keywords: print my renewal application pre matric

steps.narration: Click 'Pre Matric Scholarship Services' to open the pre-matric options.

target_hint: Prematric Scholarships For SC/ST/BC Renewal Registration
steps.narration: Under 'Prematric Scholarships For SC/ST/BC Renewal Registration', click 'Print Application'.
Select your District, Mandal, School and Academic Year, then click the highlighted button to print your renewal application.
